_meta.primary_rationale: Deep teal — signals intelligence, monitoring, trust. Evokes always-on awareness without being aggressive.
_meta.accent_rationale: Pulse green — alive, active, heartbeat. Used for status indicators and CTAs. Matches the system tray active color.
_meta.warning_note: Warning amber doubles as the paused state color in the system tray icon.
_meta.contrast: All text/background combos meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 minimum). Dark theme tuned for OLED.
